caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt, a green baseball cap, and black headphones speaks into a professional microphone in an indoor setting that appears to be a clothing store or studio. His t-shirt features the text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" in large white letters. He is seated, and as the sequence progresses, his facial expression shifts from a neutral look to an open-mouthed expression as he speaks. Behind him, the walls are decorated with several framed photographs, and racks of clothing and a white mannequin wearing a white t-shirt are visible in the background. Two logos appear at the bottom of the screen: one on the left with the text "TIST" and another on the right with the text "BODILY TOT". The scene remains stationary, with only the man's head and mouth moving as he talks.
